creator: karl@pielorz.com
text:
(In reply to Roger Pau MonnÃ© from comment #19)

Hi,

I've applied this patch to a 10.3-R VM today, and setup a scripted migration test. It's running a buildworld in background constantly - and live migrating between two XenServer nodes periodically. Additionally I'm running a clock-sync check - which compares the local hosts time to a known good host on the network.

I'll leave this running the whole of today and post back the results.

Thanks,

-Karl
